items.name: rsi_meanrev_n_7_lo_25_hi_75_trend_100
items.verdict: fallo: OOS2(21-24) +0.29; DSR 0.01; no bate B&H
items.code:
# Reversion RSI con filtro de tendencia
rsi = RSI(close, 7)
pos = 1  si rsi < 25  y  close > MA100
pos = 0  si rsi > 75

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista
cartera = promedio(7 FX + oro)          # equal-weight
# veredicto = IS 2014-2020 + OOS 2007-2013 + OOS 2021-2024 + DeflatedSharpe + MonteCarlo + bate B&H

items.name: Donchian 40/20
items.code:
# Breakout Donchian: entra al romper el maximo de 40d, sale bajo el minimo de 20d
pos = 1  si close > rolling_max(close, 40)
pos = 0  si close < rolling_min(close, 20)

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista
cartera = promedio(7 FX + oro)          # equal-weight
# veredicto = IS 2014-2020 + OOS 2007-2013 + OOS 2021-2024 + DeflatedSharpe + MonteCarlo + bate B&H

items.code:
# IBS (Internal Bar Strength)

pos = 0  si ibs > 0.9

items.name: momentum_lookback_150
items.code:
# Momentum: largo si el retorno de los ultimos 150 dias es positivo
pos = (close / close.shift(150) - 1) > 0

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista
cartera = promedio(7 FX + oro)          # equal-weight

ibs = (close - low) / (high - low)
pos = 1  si ibs < 0.1
pos = 0  si ibs > 0.7

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista
cartera = promedio(7 FX + oro)          # equal-weight
# veredicto = IS 2014-2020 + OOS 2007-2013 + OOS 2021-2024 + DeflatedSharpe + MonteCarlo + bate B&H

items.code:
# Reversion RSI con filtro de tendencia
rsi = RSI(close, 2)
pos = 1  si rsi < 5  y  close > MA200
pos = 0  si rsi > 70

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista

items.name: ma_trend_win_350
items.code:
# Tendencia: largo si el precio supera su media movil de 350 dias
pos = close > close.rolling(350).mean()

# --- comun a TODAS (motor fijo, mismo rigor) ---
senal  = pos.shift(1)          # ejecutable: decide hoy, aplica maniana (lag-1)
retorno = senal * ret - turnover*3bps   # costo realista
